description: 5 shades to enhance or neutralize color

shades.purpose: Neutralize red tones, cool down warm results
shades.use_case: Add to ash formulas for extra coolness
Add 1 inch per 1 oz color for starting levels 3-5
Add 1 inch per 1 oz color for red enhancement
Add 1 inch per 1 oz color for golden enhancement

usage_rules: Add 1 inch of corrector per 1 oz of color for most applications
Ash Blue Corrector recommended for starting levels 3-5 to prevent warmth
Ash Green Corrector for maximum green-based cooling
Red and Yellow additives for warm color enhancement
